videos.title: WAKE UP WITH A DRY MOUTH?  DO THIS TONIGHT  |  Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
WAKE UP WITH A DRY MOUTH?  DO THIS TONIGHT  |  Dr. Mandell Do you wake up every morning with a dry mouth, dry throat, cracked lips, bad breath, or an overwhelming need to drink water before you can even speak? While many people assume dehydration is the cause, the real reason may be something entirely different. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains the common causes of waking up with a dry mouth, including mouth breathing, nasal congestion, allergies, snoring, sleep apnea, medications, elevated blood sugar, stress, alcohol, caffeine, and other hidden factors that can affect saliva production during sleep. You'll learn why saliva is essential for protecting your teeth, gums, digestion, and overall health, and discover simple steps you can take tonight to improve nasal breathing, support healthy saliva production, and wake up feeling more refreshed tomorrow morning. Sometimes the smallest symptoms can reveal important clues about your health. Watch until the end and learn what your body may be trying to tell you while you sleep. 


Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Two Secrets To Unlock Your Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
Two Secrets To Unlock Your Shot If your shot feels locked up, it very well could be your strength or your stick. But it could also be the advice you were given and how you were taught that is limiting your power.

The uncomfortable part is shooting like the top 1% means doing the exact things a lot of today’s shooting coaches tell you never to do. The two cues you’ve heard your whole life, keep your hands out away from your body and just transfer your weight forward, could be the same two cues capping your power.

The best shooters in the world do the opposite where they pull the top hand back in toward the body and they drop the back hip to load the posterior oblique sling.

That’s the gap between the NHL’s best and everyone else. It usually isn’t talent or a stiffer flex although these play a role they are secondary after your shooting mechanics.

videos.title: What This Cardiologist Learned from Thousands of Patients
videos.summary_source_text:
What This Cardiologist Learned from Thousands of Patients As a cardiologist I spend every day looking at the consequences of disease. Blocked arteries. Heart attacks. Stents. Procedures. But after seeing the same patterns over and over, my attention shifted upstream. The patients with the worst outcomes often shared a common characteristic: high amounts of visceral fat. That observation led to a bigger question. Could reducing visceral fat be one of the most effective forms of prevention?

This is a clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast. You can find the full convesation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . videos.title: DeepMind's New Paper: How AI Goes From Human-Level to Superintelligent
videos.summary_source_text:
DeepMind's New Paper: How AI Goes From Human-Level to Superintelligent Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone treats AGI like the final boss — human-level AI shows up, the story ends. But Google DeepMind's newest paper, "From AGI to ASI" (published June 10, 2026), argues the opposite: AGI isn't the finish line. It might just be the starting gun.

In this video I break down what one of the world's top AI labs is now saying happens AFTER human-level AI — the four pathways from AGI to superintelligence, who thinks it's coming and when, and why the smartest people in the room still can't agree. No hype, no doom. Just the actual argument.

We get the vocabulary straight (narrow AI → AGI → ASI), unpack what DeepMind is officially on record saying, look at the projects pointing the way (Genie 3, Gemini Robotics, SIMA 2, Co-Scientist, AlphaEvolve), and weigh the believers against the skeptics — from METR's task-length doubling to Stanford's "jagged" frontier systems. The real stakes turn out to be about power and control, not killer robots.

Where do you land? Drop your AGI year in the comments — 2027? 2030? 2047? — and let's see if the evidence moves you.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro
00:43 The Vocabulary Nobody Agrees On
02:27 What DeepMind Is Actually Saying
03:35 What They're Actually Building
04:48 What Comes After AGI, According to DeepMind
06:05 Timelines, and Why Nobody Agrees
07:23 Why Believers Think This Could Get Weird Fast
08:28 Why the Skeptics Push Back
09:36 The Real Stakes: Power, Not Robots

If you want the actual argument — not the hype and not the doom — subscribe. This channel lives in that gray area on purpose.

videos.title: Sir Nick Faldo Looks Back on His First Major Victory | The Rewind
videos.summary_source_text:
Sir Nick Faldo Looks Back on His First Major Victory | The Rewind SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

Sir Nick Faldo revisits one of the most important weeks of his career as he looks back on his victory at the 1987 Open Championship at Muirfield.

In this episode of The Rewind, Faldo watches back the defining moments from the championship that delivered his first major title. Following years of rebuilding his swing, the Englishman arrived at Muirfield ready to contend and produced one of the most memorable final rounds in Open history, famously carding 18 consecutive pars to lift the Claret Jug.

videos.title: PewDiePie’s FREE Odysseus AI (Full Review & Setup)
videos.summary_source_text:
PewDiePie’s FREE Odysseus AI (Full Review & Setup) Try Recraft V4.1 now and experience an image generation model with exceptional visual taste : https://go.recraft.ai/MattWolfe

PewDiePie built an open source AI workspace called Project Odysseus and I put it through its paces so you don't have to.

Odysseus is a self-hosted AI platform that lets you run local AI models, connect APIs, do deep research, manage files, and keep your data completely off the cloud. Think ChatGPT or Claude but running on your own machine, with your own models, and full privacy control.

In this video I install it on my M3 Mac, connect local models through Ollama, run model comparisons between Gemma 3 12B and GPT 5.5, test the deep research module, and explore every feature the app has to offer including the brain memory system, the model comparison scoreboard, and the image editor (spoiler: some things work great, some things I absolutely could not get to work no matter how hard I tried).

If you've ever wanted to run AI completely offline without paying API fees or sending your data to a server, this is worth knowing about.

videos.title: Who will win Closest to the Pin @ the Floating Umbrella?! | Travelers Championship 15 1/2 Challenge
videos.summary_source_text:
Who will win Closest to the Pin @ the Floating Umbrella?! | Travelers Championship 15 1/2 Challenge Tune in to see top golf creators Roger Steele, Josh Kelley, Tisha Alyn, alongside New England legend Julian Edelman, compete in a LIVE closest to the pin challenge at the Travelers Championship’s iconic Umbrella at 15 1/2, hosted by Carson Daly. With help from Scottie Scheffler, Tommy Fleetwood, Justin Thomas, and Keegan Bradley, each Creator will pair with one of the PGA TOUR’s best, aiming to achieve the most points possible in 15 ½ minutes.  One point is earned for each ball that stays on the Umbrella at 15 ½ when it comes to rest; and ten points are awarded for every hole-in-one!  The winning team will earn a donation to their charity of choice, all thanks to Travelers!

videos.title: Could These Golf Clubs Change Golf FOREVER?
videos.summary_source_text:
Could These Golf Clubs Change Golf FOREVER? Same-length irons have always been one of golf's most debated concepts. But what happens when you combine the consistency of single-length irons with the distance benefits of a traditional set?

Rick puts the new Avoda Combo Length irons to the test to find out if this unique design can genuinely help golfers hit better shots and lower scores.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.summary_source_text:
The Hidden Cost of Constantly Monitoring Your Body Do you find yourself constantly checking your posture, pain, tightness, or alignment throughout the day?
This can feel responsible — but it may also keep your nervous system in a state of vigilance.
In this video, I explore the difference between awareness and self-monitoring, and why the quality of attention you bring to your body matters so much.

This idea is also at the heart of my book, Your Body Is Not Broken, where I explore a gentler way to understand pain, tension, fear of movement, and the habit of trying to fix yourself: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GX363HMX

If you want to deepen this approach through guided somatic movement, learn more here: https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

The BEST Anti-Aging Tool That Actually Works Is red light therapy actually worth it?

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In recent years, red light therapy has gained a lot of attention for its potential effects on recovery, skin health, and overall cellular function. But how does it actually work inside the body?

Red light therapy works by delivering specific wavelengths of light that can penetrate the skin and interact with the body at a cellular level. Inside your cells, particularly in the mitochondria, light-sensitive processes may help support energy production and cellular function.

Watch until the end to understand how red light therapy is being used and what makes it so interesting.

videos.title: Knicks Win the NBA Finals, Avalanche Offseason Questions & Remembering Doug Moe | After the Horn
videos.summary_source_text:
Knicks Win the NBA Finals, Avalanche Offseason Questions & Remembering Doug Moe | After the Horn The Larry O'Brien Trophy has been handed out, the Stanley Cup has a new home, and Denver sports fans have plenty to talk about.

On this week's episode of After the Horn, Woody Paige, Tom Green, and Jeff Morton break down the New York Knicks' NBA championship run and debate whether this team deserves the "greatest ever" conversation. The crew also dives into the latest Giannis Antetokounmpo trade rumors, explores what moves could put the Denver Nuggets back into title contention, and discusses the Colorado Avalanche's offseason outlook following another disappointing playoff exit.

The conversation shifts to the Colorado Rockies, their looming trade deadline decisions, and whether meaningful change could finally be on the horizon.

Plus, the panel reflects on one of the most emotional moments in recent Denver sports history: the celebration of life honoring Nuggets legend Doug Moe. Friends, former players, media members, and family gathered to share stories and remember the coach whose impact extended far beyond basketball.

videos.title: Memory Loss Has Nothing to Do with Your Age (Watch Out for This Instead)
videos.summary_source_text:
Memory Loss Has Nothing to Do with Your Age (Watch Out for This Instead) Memory loss and cognitive decline are not just a normal part of aging. Discover why dementia is often called type 3 diabetes, how insulin resistance affects brain function, and what you can do to improve memory, support cognitive function, and combat cognitive decline naturally.

0:00 Aging and memory loss
0:51 The stages of cognitive decline
1:30 Memory loss begins 
2:15 PET scan to assess memory problems
2:57 Type 3 diabetes and insulin resistance explained
4:04 Are your memory problems related to blood sugar control?
4:55 High blood sugar, insulin resistance, and vitamin B1
7:49 Alzheimer’s prevention 
8:15 How much benfotiamine for brain health

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4a6BEP1

Explore more information on dementia prevention, early symptoms, and cognitive decline:
▶️ https://youtu.be/OErFtjHismU
▶️ https://youtu.be/n8zzRq8aMo8
▶️ https://youtu.be/XHNOAvhkr5Q

Discover the benefits of Benfotiamine here: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/83sOzga-i0I

Looking for ways to improve memory and mental clarity? Read this article: https://drbrg.co/44d98Yu

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Symptoms of cognitive decline can begin long before a person develops dementia or Alzheimer’s disease.

In the early stages, you may experience a loss of brain energy, a buildup of protein in the brain, and shrinkage of the hippocampus. At this point, most people are not experiencing obvious memory loss. By stage 3, you may start to notice difficulty remembering names, decreased learning ability, and other subtle signs of cognitive decline. These early symptoms can begin as early as your 30s and 40s.

Alzheimer’s disease is often described as type 3 diabetes because it involves insulin resistance in the brain. Even though plenty of glucose is available, your neurons can no longer access and use that fuel efficiently.

If you need to eat frequently to avoid irritability, fatigue, or brain fog, it may be an early sign of blood sugar problems and insulin resistance.

High blood sugar and chronically elevated insulin can deplete vitamin B1, reducing the brain’s ability to produce energy. A diet high in sugar and refined carbohydrates can increase the risk of vitamin B1 deficiency.

One of the most important things you can do for dementia prevention is to reduce your sugar and carbohydrate intake. Benfotiamine can help support brain health, but it will not be nearly as effective if you continue consuming a high-carb diet.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations

videos.title: Tom Kristensen: The Best Who Never Raced In F1? | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Tom Kristensen: The Best Who Never Raced In F1? | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast As a child, Formula 1 was his dream. As a young driver, he was on the same trajectory as Michael Schumacher. Tom Kristensen was offered a chance to join a Formula 1 team, but he saw it as too risky. Instead, he found success in sportscars and made history at the Le Mans 24 Hours with a record nine victories.

Tom tells Tom Clarkson about the ‘risky’ offer he received from a Formula 1 team in the 1990s, the sportscar decision which harmed his F1 chances, and the day he impressed a World Champion in a modern F1 car.

‘Mr Le Mans’ also remembers his history-making days at the world’s most famous endurance race and explains how racing different cars made him a better driver.

TOUR EXCLUSIVES in the Titleist tour van 🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.

videos.title: 3 Storylines from the Carolina Hurricanes' Stanley Cup Final Win
videos.summary_source_text:
3 Storylines from the Carolina Hurricanes' Stanley Cup Final Win As we're still celebrating the Carolina Hurricanes' Stanley Cup victory, what were the 3 main takeaways from the series? Who stood out? What turned the tide? What does it mean for the team, organization, the fans? There's much that goes into a Stanley Cup Championship! On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes cemented themselves as a wagon, going 16-3 in the playoffs, and winning three straight games to close out the Stanley Cup Final. It wasn't just a few players but a total team effort en route to winning it all. How did this roster built over the last few seasons lead to what is the Hurricanes' second Stanley Cup? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how it was the tandem of Frederik Andersen and Brandon Bussi that helped lead the way for the Hurricanes to win it all. While Andersen won 13 games in the playoffs, Bussi was able to come in as the closer, winning three games himself. How did those two combine their efforts in helping secure the Stanley Cup? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how Rod Brind'Amour and the leadership on the roster were big keys to setting up the culture to drive home the mindset of everyone pulling on the rope. Between Jordan Staal, Sebastian Aho, Jaccob Slavin, and Jordan Martinook, those four took what Rod said and guided this group to immortality. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 16.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
16.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

videos.title: The Colorado Avalanche Send Ross Colton to Nashville. Artturi Lehkonen Gets His Season Grade.
videos.summary_source_text:
The Colorado Avalanche Send Ross Colton to Nashville. Artturi Lehkonen Gets His Season Grade. Colorado Avalanche free up $4 million in cap space with a significant trade, sending fan favorite Ross Colton to the Nashville Predators. How will this bold move shape the Avs’ offseason strategy and open the door for rising stars to step up?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the trade details, discuss the emotion behind losing Colton, and explore what Colorado gains from new assets—including two third-round picks and a goalie swap. The hosts debate Arturi Lekkonen’s season grade, weigh in on Philadelphia's acquisition of Joseph Woll, and react to the coaching shakeup as John Tortorella exits the Vegas Golden Knights. Don’t miss key insights into the Avalanche’s evolving roster and the decisions that could define their future.

Credit: Ron Chenoy-Imagn Images

videos.title: OpenRouter Fusion: Fable 5 at Half Price?
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenRouter Fusion: Fable 5 at Half Price? 🤯 Join the build in my community to get Free Fusion! https://mrc.fm/cmc

OpenRouter claims its new Fusion model matches Claude Fable 5 for half the price... so I'm testing it live. 

In this stream I dig into OpenRouter's Fusion. A compound setup that fires your prompt at a panel of models in parallel, then has a judge model weigh consensus, contradictions and blind spots before writing the final answer. Is it really Fable 5 level intelligence at half the cost, or clever marketing? I break down how it actually works, where it shines (deep research) and where it reportedly struggles (coding), then I start building my own self hosted version straight into the Tank dashboard my members get.

01:18 Live Testing Setup & Stream Chat

videos.title: Sara Blake Cheek on SEC Football, Her Social Media Brand, and Founding VIP Ballers | Closed Course
videos.summary_source_text:
Sara Blake Cheek on SEC Football, Her Social Media Brand, and Founding VIP Ballers | Closed Course On this week’s episode of Closed Course, Sara Blake Cheek joins the show to discuss her growth as a content creator, her love for SEC football, and, of course, her recent golf endeavors.

Sara is based in Las Vegas and has quickly gained a large following for the sports-related content she creates across multiple platforms. She is the founder of VIP Ballers, which offers a unique way for fans to interact with athletes.

Similar to Cameo, but designed specifically for the sports world, VIP Ballers gives athletes and fans a direct way to connect. From simple birthday messages to athletes training young kids in different sports, Sara dives into the inner workings of how the platform came to fruition and how both athletes and users can benefit from it.

Don’t miss this conversation with Sara Blake Cheek as she breaks down the highlights of how she’s grown her brand in a multitude of ways over the years. You can find Sara on Instagram and TikTok @onlysarablake, and on X @saracheeky1.

#golf #closedcourse #sarablake #sarablakecheek #pinsandaces On this week’s episode of Closed Course, Sara Blake Cheek joins the show to discuss her growth as a content creator, her love for SEC football, and, of course, her recent golf endeavors.

Sara is based in Las Vegas and has quickly gained a large following for the sports-related content she creates across multiple platforms. She is the founder of VIP Ballers, which offers a unique way for fans to interact with athletes.

Similar to Cameo, but designed specifically for the sports world, VIP Ballers gives athletes and fans a direct way to connect. From simple birthday messages to athletes training young kids in different sports, Sara dives into the inner workings of how the platform came to fruition and how both athletes and users can benefit from it.

Don’t miss this conversation with Sara Blake Cheek as she breaks down the highlights of how she’s grown her brand in a multitude of ways over the years. You can find Sara on Instagram and TikTok @onlysarablake, and on X @saracheeky1.

#golf #closedcourse #sarablake #sarablakecheek #pinsandaces

videos.summary_source_text:
Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI) Fable 5 is gone, and now the big question is simple: what comes next? OpenRouter just introduced Fusion, a system that sends one prompt to multiple AI models, compares their answers, finds the blind spots, and fuses everything into one stronger response. The wild part is that one budget Fusion setup came extremely close to Fable 5 on deep research, while costing around half as much.

👉 Get your Claude-A-Thon seat before spots fill up: https://links.outskill.com/AIVJUN

OpenRouter’s new Fusion model system

videos.title: Don’t Try This If You Like Skating Slowly
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Try This If You Like Skating Slowly The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

Why Every Golfer Should Use Resistance Bands for Their Swing Get Jackson's 6 drill worksheet HERE! https://golfwell.kit.com/8f6e4b99ae

Most golfers try to change their swing. The problem? It's often easier to change your body than your swing.

#ad   Go to http://www.huel.com/GOLFWELL to check out the High Protein Starter Bundle and get 20% off your order with my code GOLFWELL. Minimum spend required ($65+)

In this video, Jackson Koert takes me through his favorite resistance band drills to improve rotation, load the backswing, sequence the downswing, and fix common issues like early extension. Instead of focusing on positions, these drills create the feels that make good movement happen naturally.

Along the way, I discovered a few things I had never felt before in my golf swing—including a completely different sense of rotation and how to stay in posture through impact.

If you've ever struggled with:
• Limited rotation
• Early extension
• Getting stuck in the downswing
• Poor backswing loading
• Inconsistent ball striking

These drills might help you feel the difference immediately.

videos.title: U.S. Open Preview & Matt Fitzpatrick joins | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
U.S. Open Preview & Matt Fitzpatrick joins | The Drop The Drop is here to preview the third major of the season, the best players in the world head to Shinnecock Hills for the U.S. Open. We’re joined by 2022 U.S. Open champion Matt Fitzpatrick and his wife Katherine, as they discuss the state of his game, life on the road as a PGA TOUR couple and preparing for parenthood. Ryan Gerard has finished runner-up on TOUR three times this year, and we chat with him not only about the state of his game – but also his viral moment clapping back at a fan and how he’s an aspiring interior designer. Major weeks mean an appearance by the EliminaTOUR, as we use stats and history to narrow the U.S. Open field down to one winner – and then our hosts go through their own picks and predictions. Finally, with the U.S. Open coming on Father’s Day weekend, we pay tribute to the dads on TOUR and on The Drop.

videos.title: Fitting the Perfect Clubs for a Former Basketball Player
videos.summary_source_text:
Fitting the Perfect Clubs for a Former Basketball Player FULL LIVE FITTING AT THE TROTT SHOP.

I’m a fan of incorporating teaching into my fittings, in fact I think with many amateurs it’s essential. For any golfer to be successful on the course we need to have a basic understanding of how to change start lines and curvature when playing, these fittings arm the golfers with those tools and work a set of clubs to enhance the skills and not work against their progression.

Notice how I fit for where the player is going not where they are today.

There is so much great information in these fitting videos, not every fitting plays out the way a tour session might but I believe it gives you an insight into what I feel should be part of a top level fitting.

Thanks to Jeff for allowing us to film his session & I wish him all the success with his game moving forward, and like all our customers you’re welcome back anytime.

Experience The Trott Shop at La Valle Coastal Club. We offer the Tour fitting and build experience directly to golfers seeking the best.

Learn more: https://thetrott.shop

Book a Tour Fitting Experience: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Whether you need a full bag fitting, driver upgrade, or custom club build, we’ve got you covered.

Our in-house coach, Skyler Finnell, is a Grass League professional, former PGA Tour Latin America player, and resident instructor.

For any golfer to be successful on the course we need to have a basic understanding of how to change start lines and curvature when playing, these fittings arm the golfers with those tools and work a set of clubs to enhance the skills and not work against their progression.

Notice how I fit for where the player is going not where they are today.

videos.title: Grok 5: 6 Trillion Parameters... But Is It AGI?
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5: 6 Trillion Parameters... But Is It AGI? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

In this video, we separate confirmed facts from speculation and examine what Grok 5 actually appears to be based on the evidence available today. We look at the rumored parameter counts, the MoE architecture, xAI's unique approach to real-time data, multimodal ambitions, benchmark expectations, safety concerns, enterprise adoption challenges, and what Grok 5 would need to accomplish to genuinely compete with GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, and Llama.

Because the biggest question isn't whether Grok 5 will be powerful.

The question is whether it will be powerful enough to justify the extraordinary claims being made about it.

We'll also examine one of the most important realities often ignored in AI coverage: bigger models do not automatically become smarter models. More parameters, more GPUs, and larger training runs can improve capabilities—but they don't magically solve hallucinations, reasoning limitations, reliability issues, or alignment challenges.

Here's what we'll cover:

• What Grok 5 actually is and what has been confirmed so far
• The massive parameter count everyone keeps quoting—and why it may be misleading
• How Mixture-of-Experts models really work
• xAI's use of real-time data from X and why it's controversial
• Grok's multimodal strategy across text, voice, image, and video
• Benchmark performance expectations versus current reality
• How Grok compares with GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, and Llama
• Safety concerns, misinformation risks, and alignment tradeoffs
• Enterprise adoption challenges and business viability
• Expected release timeline and what to watch for when it launches

Most importantly, we'll answer the question every potential user should ask before believing the headlines:

What would Grok 5 actually need to prove before it deserves the hype?

Because in AI, the most dangerous mistakes happen when marketing gets mistaken for evidence.

By the end of this video, you'll understand where Grok 5 appears genuinely promising, where the biggest uncertainties remain, and how to evaluate future AI announcements without getting swept up in the excitement.

That's the BitBiased mission:

Get excited about what's real.
Stay skeptical about what's rumored.

📌 Do you think Grok 5 will genuinely challenge GPT-5, Claude, and Gemini—or is the hype getting ahead of reality? Drop your prediction in the comments. I read every one, and the best insights often inspire future videos.

🔗 Join the BitBiased Newsletter for weekly no-hype AI analysis:
https://bitbiased.ai/

videos.title: You Keep Clearing Your Throat… But It’s NOT Mucus!   Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
You Keep Clearing Your Throat… But It’s NOT Mucus!   Dr. Mandell If you constantly feel the need to clear your throat, you may be surprised to learn that the problem isn’t always excess mucus. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains the hidden causes behind chronic throat clearing, including silent acid reflux (LPR), postnasal drip, allergies, dehydration, and throat irritation that can trigger your body to produce protective mucus. You’ll discover why repeatedly clearing your throat may actually make the problem worse and learn simple, natural strategies that can help break the cycle. From lifestyle changes and hydration to identifying common triggers and knowing when it’s time to seek medical evaluation, this video provides practical tips to help you breathe easier and finally understand what your body is trying to tell you. If you’ve been struggling with that constant lump-in-the-throat feeling or the sensation that something is always stuck there, this information could make all the difference. 

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Gemini vs Claude 2026: Which AI Model Is Actually Worth Your Money?
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini vs Claude 2026: Which AI Model Is Actually Worth Your Money? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

You're probably paying for an AI model right now — but there's a good chance you're paying for the wrong one.

Every AI company wants you to believe their model is the smartest. OpenAI says GPT-5.5 is the most capable general assistant. Anthropic positions Claude Opus 4.8 as the deep-reasoning specialist. Google pushes Gemini 3.5 Flash as the fastest and most cost-effective multimodal platform. And somehow, every benchmark seems to prove whoever published it is winning.

That's exactly why this comparison exists.

In this video, we put ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini head-to-head across the categories that actually matter in professional work: architecture, training philosophy, performance benchmarks, safety systems, pricing, latency, integrations, and real-world productivity.

No cherry-picked demos.
No vendor marketing slides.
No "this model destroyed that model" clickbait.

Instead, we're looking at what happens when these systems leave the benchmark charts and enter the environments where people actually work: coding projects, document analysis, research, writing, business operations, enterprise workflows, and everyday decision-making.

We'll break down the strengths and weaknesses of each platform, explain why benchmark results often tell an incomplete story, and expose one of the most misunderstood topics in AI today: the difference between advertised capabilities and practical reality.

Along the way we'll cover:

• How GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.8, and Gemini 3.5 Flash are built
• Why architecture matters less than most people think
• The context-window marketing trap
• Which model performs best for coding and software development
• Long-document analysis and reasoning performance
• Safety, alignment, and hallucination behavior
• Pricing, throughput, and enterprise costs
• Ecosystem integrations and workflow advantages
• Which AI model makes sense for different types of work

Most importantly, we'll answer the question that actually matters:

Which AI should YOU be using?

Because in 2026, there isn't one universal winner anymore. There are specialized tools with different tradeoffs, and choosing the wrong one can waste time, money, and productivity long before you notice.

By the end of this video, you'll know exactly where each model excels, where it struggles, and which one fits your specific workflow.

That's the BitBiased mission:
Get excited about what's real.
Stay skeptical about what's rumored.

📌 Which AI are you currently using — ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini? And what kind of work do you use it for? Drop it in the comments. I read every one, and many of them inspire future videos.

videos.title: GPT-5.5 vs GPT-6: What's Confirmed vs Pure Speculation
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.5 vs GPT-6: What's Confirmed vs Pure Speculation You're paying for an AI assistant right now — and there's a decent chance it's the wrong one for the work you actually do.


"Best AI" stopped being a meaningful answer in 2026. Every model claims to be the smartest. Every benchmark gets cherry-picked. And every comparison video picks a winner before the test even starts.

This one doesn't.
We put ChatGPT (GPT-5.5), Claude (Opus 4.8), and Gemini (3.5 Flash) through the work that actually matters in a professional day — long documents, coding tasks, data analysis, writing, and the tools you live in. Not which one sounds most impressive. Which one holds up when the stakes are real.


We also call out the context window trap almost everyone falls into — the gap between what these models advertise in the app versus what you actually get through the API — and why that difference quietly breaks a lot of workflows before they even start.

Here's the honest breakdown:

ChatGPT (GPT-5.5) — The broad platform generalist. 60+ integrations, memory across sessions, and the widest tool ecosystem of the three. The right call if your workday is messy, multi-tool, and needs one interface to hold it all together.

Claude (Opus 4.8) — The deep-work specialist. 1 million token context window through the API, exceptional at long document reasoning, complex coding, and sustained multi-step tasks. If your work demands depth over breadth, this is where to look.

Gemini (3.5 Flash) — The native Google operator. Baked into Workspace, aggressive on pricing, and the obvious pick if Docs, Sheets, Gmail, and Meet are already where your work lives.

And then there's the benchmark reality check nobody in this space wants to say out loud — the clean, independent three-way scoreboard everyone pretends to have basically doesn't exist yet. We show you what the data actually says, what it doesn't, and how to stop letting vendor marketing make the decision for you.

By the end you'll know which model fits YOUR job — not which one wins a press release.
That's the BitBiased mission: get excited about what's real, stay skeptical about what's rumored.
📌 Which one are you leaning toward — and what work do you actually do? Drop it in the comments. I read every one, and they shape the next deep dive.
🔗 Join the BitBiased Newsletter for weekly no-hype AI breakdowns: https://bitbiased.ai/

videos.title: Saab skulle fått BMW-motorer. Och drivas av Koenigsegg!
videos.summary_source_text:
Saab skulle fått BMW-motorer. Och drivas av Koenigsegg! Del 4 av serien filmer om Saab-Fenix som tyvärr inte kom i serieproduktion: 
Eftersom det var minst sagt ekonomiskt skakigt hos GM beslutade Saab att ta in en annan motorleverantör till den planerade nya generationen Saab 9-3: BMW.

Mindre, lättare, snålare, renare avgaser – men samma effekt.

Peter Dahl var ansvarig för motorprojektet och berättar om det, och också om Saabandan och Koenigseggs engagemang.

Anders Johansson som driver Griffin Cars med Gabriel Palmenäs, och Anders förklarar också i den här filmen hur elsystemet i den gamla Saab 9-3 kan "tala" med den nya.

Bakgrund:
Efterföljaren till den sista generationen Saab 9-3 hade kommit mycket långt, när Saab gick i konkurs. Projekt 540, eller Phoenix/Fenix,  hade bland annat en ny avancerad bak- och framvagn, ny drivlina och även en elbakaxel på gång.
Anders Johansson och Gabriel Palmenäs (som givetvis jobbade på Saab när det begav sig) driver företaget Griffin Cars, och har köpt upp ett restlager av axlar och motorer för att modernisera befintliga Saab 9-3 bilar.
Men den stora planen är att bygga en liten serie moderna bilar, med äkta Saabteknik! (Det återkommer vi till längre fram)
I en serie intervjuer med Saab-folk som var med och utvecklade Fenixplattformen, ska vi tala teknik, men givetvis också provköra en av de uppdaterade bilarna.
I filmerna:
Del 1: bakgrund och framtidsversion
Del 2: Chassit – Gunnar Olsson
och Per Janssson
Del 3: Elbakaxel, Stefan Barbunopulos
Del 4: Motor, Peter Dahl
Del 5: Intervju med designer Jascon Castriota
Del 6: Provkörning!

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Se filmerna utan reklam före alla andra: 
Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

videos.title: Bacon Strip to Dollar Bill Divots
videos.summary_source_text:
Bacon Strip to Dollar Bill Divots If you hit thin shots, your shaft angle might be the hidden problem.

When the club gets too vertical coming into impact, the leading edge gets pulled up off the ground. That’s when you start seeing thin shots, blocks to the right, and toe-down divots that look like bacon strips.

Tour players do the opposite.

They match their swing plane and shaft angle so the sole sits flush with the ground at impact. That’s how they can hit it clean from tight lies, hardpan, bare dirt, and just about anywhere.

That’s exactly why I designed the Brick. https://b29bluebrick.com/

It helps you train the same shaft angle tour players use, keep your hands under your chest, and get the club working flatter through impact.

Do the drills, miss the stick, and start turning those toe-down divots into perfect dollar bills.

videos.title: My favorite high-protein cookies
videos.summary_source_text:
My favorite high-protein cookies Protein cookie recipe right this way 👇

What you need:

• 150 g (5.3 oz) unsalted butter, softened
• 150 g (5.3 oz) nut butter
• 240 g (8.4 oz) light brown soft sugar or coconut sugar
• 2 large eggs
• 8 scoops Protein Prodigy (my new protein powder)
• 100 g (3.6 oz) plain flour
• 1 teaspoon bicarbonate of soda
• 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon
• 200 g (7 oz) rolled oats
• 150 g (5.3 oz) roughly chopped nuts or mixed seeds
• 150 g (5.3 oz) dark chocolate, roughly chopped
• 2 pinches of salt

How to make it:

1️⃣ Heat the oven to 170°C / 150°C fan / 340°F / Gas3.

2️⃣ In a mixing bowl, using a wooden spoon or rubber spatula, beat together the butter, nut butter and sugar for 1–2 minutes until pale and light.

3️⃣ Add the eggs and mix until thoroughly combined.

4️⃣ Add Protein Prodigy, the flour, bicarbonate of soda, cinnamon and salt. Mix until combined. Add the oats, chopped nuts and chocolate, then mix again until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.

5️⃣ Divide the mixture into 16-20 portions, shape them into rough balls and arrange them on lined baking sheets.

6️⃣ Bake for 10–12 minutes, until golden brown. Leave to cool on a wire rack.

Makes approximately 16–20 cookies. Protein cookie recipe right this way 👇

videos.title: Before you get your boxers in a twist, I really need you all to think about this....
videos.summary_source_text:
Before you get your boxers in a twist, I really need you all to think about this.... What side are YOU on???

What separates someone who wears a collar and someone who doesn’t?

- Class? I’ve seen some of the most brutal golf course fights with 2 dudes in collars and pressed khakis
- Respect? People in hoodies can ALSO know how to repair divots, and pitch marks
- Dressing for the Occassion? If I mistake the bunkers for asphalt, I’m not letting the marshal tell me what to wear.

Play your best, keep the pace, mind the course and be on your way.

videos.title: Almedalen 2026 - torsdag 25 juni
videos.summary_source_text:
Almedalen 2026 - torsdag 25 juni 8.15-9.00
Digital tillit och federativ infrastruktur – nyckeln till säker samverkan mellan aktörer
Offentlig sektor och näringsliv behöver i allt högre grad dela data och använda gemensamma tjänster. Hur förenklas detta genom digital tillit? Hur skapar vi en infrastruktur som möjliggör säker samverkan utan att varje aktör bygger egna lösningar?

9.30-10.15
När AI blir en kollega: Vem gör vad – och vem bär ansvaret?

AI har gått från att vara ett passivt verktyg till att bli en aktör som fattar beslut och driver arbetsflöden. Det ställer helt nya krav på hur ansvar fördelas, hur ledare leder och hur medarbetare samverkar med tekniken. Hur rustar vi organisationer för den förändringen – och vem bär ansvaret?

10.45-11.30 
Att följa pengarna – vad är bankernas roll i kampen mot välfärdsbrottsligheten?

Den kriminella ekonomin omsätter 352 miljarder kronor per år och välfärdsbrott är en växande del. Banker har en unik insyn i transaktioner, mönster och avvikelser som tidigt kan signalera missbruk av välfärdssystemen. Vad är bankernas roll i arbetet mot välfärdsbrottsligheten?

13.00-13.45 
Kan AI stärka demokratin och lösa samhällsproblem – på riktigt?

Kan AI användas för att sänka trösklar till demokratiskt deltagande, öka ungas valdeltagande och bygga förtroende för samhällets institutioner? Hur går vi från teknik och vision till att lösa stora samhällsutmaningar inom områden som klimat, hälsa, utbildning, inkludering och humanitärt arbete?

14.15-15.00 
Ett energisystem som håller – hur säkrar vi Sveriges framtida energiförsörjning?

Energibehoven ökar, och tillgång till säker och tillförlitlig energi till rimlig kostnad är avgörande för samhälle, företag och människor. Geopolitisk osäkerhet pressar systemet – men kan också påskynda omställningen. Så hur formar vi gemensamt en hållbar energiinfrastruktur för Sverige?

15.30-16.15 
Hur kan vi använda AI på ett säkert och förtroendeskapande sätt?

AI förändrar både offentlig och privat sektor i grunden – men hur hanterar vi riskerna när användningen ökar? Hur säkerställer vi att teknikutvecklingen går hand i hand med säkerhet, ansvar och efterlevnad av regler?

Läs mer här: https://www.pwc.se/sv/almedalen.html 8.15-9.00

videos.title: Almedalen 2026 - onsdag 24 juni
videos.summary_source_text:
Almedalen 2026 - onsdag 24 juni 9.30-10.15 
Finansbranschen i en ny världsordning – resiliens och anpassning i osäkra tider

Geopolitisk oro, klimatkris och snabb teknikutveckling formar en ny verklighet. Hur bygger finanssektorn motståndskraft för att möta osäkerheten? Hur bidrar en stabil finansbransch till ett mer resilient samhälle – och vilket ledarskap krävs när framtiden är svårläst?

  10.45-11.30 
Läkare räddar ju liv! Spelar vår naivitet de kriminella i händerna?

Kriminella aktörer bygger sin affär på en sårbar länk: förtroenderollen. I offentlig sektor och i det privata näringslivet lockas eller hotas människor att bli möjliggörare för olika typer av brottslighet. Hur skyddar vi oss mot fenomenet möjliggörare och hur kan vi stoppa otillåten påverkan?

  13.00-13.45 
Hur påverkar fördomar möjligheten att ta sig in på arbetsmarknaden – och vad kan vi göra åt det?

I ett panelsamtal lyfter vi insikter från en aktuell rapport och utforskar hur företag kan bredda rekryteringsbasen, stärka inkludering och skapa mer rättvisa vägar in på arbetsmarknaden. Deltagare från näringsliv, forskning och civilsamhälle diskutera vad som krävs för att vända utvecklingen.

  14.15-15.00 
När geopolitik blir kod: Cyberangrepp mot Norden i skuggan av ett nytt säkerhetsläge

Östersjön och Arktis har blivit centrala i stormaktsdynamiken. Nordisk energiproduktion, undervattenskablar och digital infrastruktur är strategiska mål. Statliga aktörer bedriver cyberoperationer i gråzonen – spionage, sabotageförberedelser och påverkanskampanjer. Hur bygger vi motståndskraft i system och samhälle?

  15.30-16.15 
Klimatrisker och framtidens kriser – hur rustar vi näringsliv och samhälle?

Resiliens är ett modeord inom näringslivet, men har klimatriskerna fått plats i beredskapsplanen? Klimatförändringar kan slå ut samhällsviktig verksamhet och sätta kritiska tjänster ur spel. Hur kan styrelser och ledningar förebygga effekterna av klimatrisker och bygga verklig resiliens?

  16.45-17.30 Ändrad momshantering – nya möjligheter för civilsamhället?
Civilsamhället pressas av regelverk och kostnader. En dom från Högsta förvaltningsdomstolen i maj i år kan förändra villkoren för samverkan – men räcker det, och vad krävs för att sektorn ska kunna växa och bidra ännu mer?

Läs mer här: https://www.pwc.se/sv/almedalen.html 9.30-10.15

videos.title: Almedalen 2026 - tisdag 23 juni
videos.summary_source_text:
Almedalen 2026 - tisdag 23 juni 9.30-10.15

AI som konkurrenskraft – hur bygger vi en motståndskraftig nordisk industri? (Combient + PwC)

Nordisk industri pressas av snabb AI‑utveckling, geopolitisk oro och hård global konkurrens. Hur säkrar vi digital och industriell suveränitet, tillgång till tillförlitlig infrastruktur och regler som både stärker motståndskraften och möjliggör tillväxt?

10.45-11.30

Lågt förtroende för delning av hälsodata – hur påverkar detta nya allianser i vårdens ekosystem?
Den svenska vården står vid ett vägskäl. Samtidigt som vårdbehovet och bristen på personal ökar, förändras medborgarnas förväntningar. Hur säkrar vi ett ekosystem som möter framtida behov och förväntningar? I seminariet utforskar vi hur fler aktörer kan bidra till en mer hållbar och tillgänglig vård,
13.00-13.45

Hur hanterar kommunerna nationella digitaliseringsinitiativ utifrån lokala behov?

Allt färre ska leverera välfärd åt allt fler och digitalisering ses som en viktig del i vägen framåt. Medan kommunernas förutsättningar skiljer sig åt, stöttar nationella aktörer med gemensamma lösningar. Hur balanseras nationella och lokala initiativ i praktiken, och vilka effekter uppnås?

14.15-15.00

Hur får vi igång bostadsbyggandet – är ett ökat småhusbyggande lösningen?

Byggandet domineras av små lägenheter i storstäder, samtidigt som många vill bo i småhus. Är det dags för en ny ”egna hem”-satsning – eller fler småhus som hyresrätt? Vilka politiska förändringar krävs för att öka bostadsbyggandet, och vem ska bygga?

15.30-16.15 
Skatterna: Slagträ i valet eller grund för tillväxt?

Skatterna är avgörande för företagens framtid och Sverige som företagarnation. Men kortsiktighet och blockpolitik riskerar att undergräva det långsiktiga förtroendet. Vilka skattefrågor är viktigast för företagen inför valet? Och kan politiken hitta en gemensam grund som skapar stabilitet?

Läs mer: https://www.pwc.se/sv/almedalen.html 9.30-10.15

videos.title: Hips in the downswing
videos.summary_source_text:
Hips in the downswing Have you ever felt like your downswing is out of sync, as if your arms are on their own mission apart from your body? It's a common issue—swinging steeply can cause a whole array of problems, from hitting the ball off to the right, hooking, chunking, and feeling disconnected. The right elbow’s position plays a pivotal role in managing these downswing issues. Simply put, if your right elbow is out of alignment, syncing up your swing becomes nearly impossible.

**First Move of the Downswing: Tucking the Elbow**

When initiating your downswing, the key is to ensure your right elbow tucks into your right side. This initial move helps you shallow the club and aligns it perfectly, with the club pointing at the golf ball or just outside of it when you're halfway through your downswing. It's a position that empowers you to direct your full energy efficiently into the ball, reducing reliance on timing. 

Should your elbow pop out early instead, you create a steep club path, leading to inconsistent hits and potential wrist strain. Remember, a rogue elbow often results in losing the angle of lag and, consequently, makes solid contact elusive.

**Creating Daylight with the Daylight Elbow Tuck**

If you tuck the elbow correctly, you’ll notice a slight gap between your left arm and right elbow. This 'daylight' indicates you’re creating enough space to release the club naturally. In turn, this space allows your body to prepare for a powerful release at the point just ahead of the ball.

**Rope Pull Analogy: The Ideal Body Mechanics**

Picture holding a heavy weight attached to a rope or imagine pulling a car with a rope. You wouldn't merely push it forward; instead, you’d situate your body to pull effectively. Engage your right elbow by feeling like your funny bone is sticking to your right shirt seam. As your body opens up during the swing, this feeling helps create a dynamic and powerful position.

Maintaining body rotation is critical. Many players make the mistake of stopping their body’s rotation to get their arms ahead: a posture that complicates the swing. Keep the rotation flowing, allowing your hips and chest to guide the club toward impact.

**Executing the Perfect Downswing**

Reflect on these fundamentals: tuck your elbow early, feel the connection of that funny bone against your body, and keep rotating. Employing these techniques provides a sense of power and control. Much like pulling that rope, transferring this mental image to your golf swing unlocks swing potential. Now, go hit those awe-inspiring shots with confidence!

With these adjustments to your downswing, you’re on a path to smoother swings and more consistent golf shots. Practice and apply these tips, and you’ll soon see the difference they can make!

videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Healthiest Bread on Earth (Only 5 Ingredients!) Most people think they’re making a healthy choice when they buy whole wheat bread, but the truth may surprise you.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4eKb8h1

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, Dr. Berg reveals the truth about whole wheat bread, white bread, blood sugar spikes, and why most store-bought breads may be damaging your health more than you realize. Learn why whole wheat bread and white bread can have a similar glycemic index, how phytic acid blocks important minerals like zinc, magnesium, iron, and calcium, and why low-carb bread may be a healthier alternative.

You’ll also discover an easy homemade low-carb bread recipe made with simple ingredients like almond flour, psyllium husk powder, eggs, and butter. This keto bread recipe is gluten-free, low glycemic, blood sugar-friendly, and designed to help support weight loss, insulin resistance, and metabolic health.

videos.title: Why Jake Knapp lives by "W.I.N." | The Life | PGA TOUR Studios
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Jake Knapp lives by "W.I.N." | The Life | PGA TOUR Studios The Life: Jake Knapp presented by Melin gives fans an off-the-course look into the perspective Jake Knapp has gained over his professional golf career with three simple words: "What's Important Now?" The letters W.I.N. are tattooed on his wrist, serving as a daily reminder of the true definition of winning on and off the golf course. Jake's journey to becoming a PGA TOUR champion is rooted in Costa Mesa, California where Jake credits the people and places that raised him. Join Knapp as he returns to Southern California to relive childhood memories with his friends, family, and coaches, while answering the 'What's Important Now?' mantra he lives by every day.

videos.title: AMG put a 'FERRARI' V8 in the NEW GLE 63?!
videos.summary_source_text:
AMG put a 'FERRARI' V8 in the NEW GLE 63?! Mercedes has unveiled the updated Mercedes-AMG GLE 63 & GLS 63, and we’re about to see what’s changed in terms of design, interior and performance. We’ll also discuss how much we think it will cost. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-16-06

The AMG GLE 63 & GLS 63 have had mid-life facelifts! 

It's been three years since Mercedes last updated the cars that were originally released in 2018 & 2019 respectively, so let's see what's changed...

In terms of the exterior design, the cars still look relatively similar to the previous editions, with a few tweaks here and there. Up front there’s a bigger & bolder grille (which lights up at night), flanked on either side by headlights featuring massive 3-pointed stars, just like the AMG GT 4-door. The side profile on both cars is almost identical to the previous car, while the taillights feature even more 3-pointed star graphics, and as before, the four massive exhaust pipes have been retained for each car. 

On the inside, there’s one key difference - the huge wraparound screen that stretches across the dash, featuring the digital dials, infotainment screen, and passenger screen! It’s the same as found in the non-AMG editions of these cars, although here there are some different graphics. The seats come with additional supports, exclusive leather, and there’s a very similar steering wheel to that found in the AMG GT. 

When you peek under the bonnet, you’ll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8, just as you did in the previous editions! However, in this instance, the engine has been given a new flat-plane crank! It’s the sort of thing you’d find in high-revving, naturally-aspirated V8s, however, don’t expect any additional power - it still produces 612hp & 850Nm, just as before. 

We don’t yet know the price, but we can guarantee one thing - neither of these cars will come cheap! The cheaper option will be the GLE 63, but don’t expect the new one to cost any less than an eye-watering £140,000!! 

So are you impressed with the upgrades to these top-of-the-range SUVs? Let us know in the comments! videos.title: 15.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
15.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Hindi - 15.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 15.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Looking Back at 10 Key Avs Moments to Celebrate the Locked on Podcast Network's 10th Anniversary!
videos.summary_source_text:
Looking Back at 10 Key Avs Moments to Celebrate the Locked on Podcast Network's 10th Anniversary! Colorado Avalanche fans relive a decade of unforgettable moments as the Locked On Podcast Network celebrates its 10th anniversary. Which Avalanche memory stands above all—Gabriel Landeskog’s emotional return from a groundbreaking injury, or the 2022 Stanley Cup triumph? Shocking trades, like the departure of Mikko Rantanen, and powerhouse playoff goals from Nazem Kadri and Darren Helm keep the debate fierce.

Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson highlight the impact of outdoor NHL games, key trade deadline returns, Peter McNab’s legacy behind the mic, and the franchise-altering drafting of Cale Makar. From coaching shakeups to the electric Game 82 win over the St. Louis Blues, every pivotal Avalanche milestone is on the table. Which iconic play or player should top the list, and what memories still ignite Mile High passion? Dive into the ultimate Colorado Avalanche countdown.

videos.title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking Google DeepMind just dropped a massive paper called From AGI to ASI, and the message is bigger than another AI release. The paper argues that AGI may not be the finish line everyone is waiting for. It may be the moment the real race begins. Once human-level AI can be copied, sped up, connected into agent teams, and used to build better AI, the jump after AGI could matter even more than AGI itself.

videos.title: Why Modern Life Keeps You Stressed
videos.summary_source_text: Why Modern Life Keeps You Stressed Modern life keeps many people stuck in a constant state of stress. The nervous system was designed to handle short bursts of danger, not endless emails, deadlines, notifications, and worries. Over time, that constant activation can become the default setting. Learning how to stimulate the vagus nerve through slow, intentional breathing may be one of the simplest ways to restore balance and quiet the stress response. videos.title: GPT-5.5 vs Claude Fable 5: Which AI Model Is Worth the Price?
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.5 vs Claude Fable 5: Which AI Model Is Worth the Price? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

Is Claude Fable 5 or GPT-5.5 actually better — or is the whole debate just marketing? I ran both models against the same tasks, paid for both out of pocket, and broke down the numbers the vendors don't highlight.

In this video: architecture differences, real benchmark results (SWE-Bench, reasoning evals, hallucination rates), actual API pricing, and a clear use-case framework so you know which model to reach for — and when.

⏱ CHAPTERS
00:00:58 Architecture & Features
00:02:05 Coding
00:03:07 Reasoning & General QA
00:03:48 Vision & Multimodal
00:04:20 Hallucinations & Safety
00:05:10 Pricing & Throughput
00:05:58 Fine-Tuning & Customization
00:06:38 Ecosystem & Integrations
00:07:22 Use-Case Recommendations
00:08:21 Strengths & Weaknesses Recap


🔑 KEY TAKEAWAYS
- Claude Fable 5 leads on coding (SWE-Bench ~80% vs ~59%), long-context tasks, and hallucination rate
- GPT-5.5 leads on ecosystem integrations, speed, and cost (~half the price per token)
- Neither wins everything — the right answer depends on your context window needs, budget, and how costly a wrong answer is
- The smartest move: route by task, not by loyalty

📌 SOURCES & MODEL CARDS
[Link to sources]

🔔 Subscribe for AI comparisons without the launch-week hype — BitBiased.

videos.title: Varför bankkontot är riskfyllt på lång sikt
videos.summary_source_text:
Varför bankkontot är riskfyllt på lång sikt Bankkontot känns tryggt — men det är en garanterad förlust om du låter pengarna stanna där för länge.

Jag går igenom hur inflation urholkar köpkraften (Riksbankens mål: 2% per år), varför priserna ökade med nästan 23 procent mellan 2021 och 2025, och hur du bör tänka kring kortsiktiga kontra långsiktiga pengar.

Tumregel: 0–3 år på konto, längre än så — investera.

Mer på rikatillsammans.se — länk i pinnad kommentar.

videos.title: Are You Secretly Dehydrated? (Check Now)
videos.summary_source_text:
Are You Secretly Dehydrated? (Check Now) You may think dehydration only causes thirst, but it can also lead to fatigue, headaches, dizziness, dry skin, low energy, brain fog, muscle cramps, and even stubborn weight issues.

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4nVGCE7

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, you’ll learn a simple at-home hydration test that can help you quickly determine if your body is low on fluids. All it takes is a quick skin pinch test to check your skin turgor, a simple indicator of hydration levels and fluid balance underneath the skin.

Watch until the end to learn what your skin may be telling you about your hydration status and why proper hydration is about more than just drinking water.

Dr. Eric Berg, DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices but focuses on health education through social media.

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=15.06.26

If your irons feel inconsistent, the strike isn’t clean, and accuracy comes and goes, the problem may have started much earlier in the swing than you think.

In this lesson, we worked with Matt to uncover the backswing mistake that was leading to poor iron shots, steep delivery, and unreliable contact. Once we changed that pattern, everything started to improve: better strikes, better height, and much straighter shots.

This is a great lesson for any golfer who feels like their irons can look good one day and disappear the next. If that sounds familiar, this will help you understand what may really be going on.

videos.title: 25 Years of Fitness Advice in 60 Seconds
videos.summary_source_text:
25 Years of Fitness Advice in 60 Seconds What would 25 years of fitness advice sound like if you had to fit it into just 60 seconds?

I'm going to break down some of the biggest lessons learned from decades of training, coaching, physical therapy, injury prevention, muscle building, fat loss, and helping people train smarter for life.

The truth is, most people overcomplicate fitness. They chase the perfect workout split, the perfect diet, the perfect supplement stack, or the perfect exercise, when the real answers are usually much simpler. That does not mean they are easy. Nutrition is simple, but staying consistent with it is not. The workout may only take one hour, but the other 23 hours of your day determine whether your results actually show up.

You will learn why injuries should not be treated like a total shutdown, why changing your workout split can restart progress, why training to failure can be one of the most objective ways to stimulate muscle growth, and why recovery is the thing that determines whether failure actually works.

I also cover the difference between muscle soreness and joint soreness, why tight muscles often need better full range of motion instead of endless stretching, and why lifting a weight you cannot control is usually a sign that it is too heavy. Training hard matters, but training smart matters even more, especially as you get older.

This short also touches on some of the most misunderstood nutrition and supplement topics, including carbs, calories, protein, creatine, omega-3s, and why most supplements are optional while a few can make a meaningful difference when your training and diet are already in place.

If your goal is to build muscle, burn fat, get stronger, avoid injury, and stay consistent for the long run, these are the fitness rules that matter most.

For more fitness tips and education, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

videos.title: Claude 6: What's Actually True, What's Hype, and Why the Government Shut It Down
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude 6: What's Actually True, What's Hype, and Why the Government Shut It Down Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

Every few weeks, the AI industry drops another “this changes everything” model — and the latest wave around Anthropic’s next-generation Claude system is no different. But behind the hype, benchmarks, and leaked-sounding claims, there’s a much messier story: unclear model naming, questionable performance narratives, safety systems that quietly reroute your prompts, and a government intervention that no one fully agrees on yet.

In this breakdown, I cut through the noise and walk you through what’s actually real, what’s marketing spin, and what’s straight-up speculation in the so-called “Claude 6” conversation. We look at the real Claude lineup, what benchmarks actually tell us (and what they don’t), how safety routing systems may change your experience without you noticing, and whether any of this is truly approaching AGI — or just faster pattern recognition with better branding.

🔥 TIMESTAMPS
00:01:36 What Claude 6 Is Actually Built On
00:03:12 The Numbers: Verify vs Vendor
00:05:58 The Safety System Nobody Voted For
00:07:11 The Government Recall
00:09:13 The AGI Question
00:10:44 What Claude 6 Could Realistically Be

📌 KEY TAKEAWAYS

“Claude 6” is not an official Anthropic release — it’s speculation, not a product
Many viral benchmark claims are either self-reported or non-verifiable
Real Claude models rely on Constitutional AI + layered safety systems
Some safety systems may route or filter queries, but not in the dramatic “secret model swap” way often described
Government AI regulation exists, but the “full model recall” narrative is highly questionable
The real story isn’t AGI — it’s incremental capability gains wrapped in aggressive marketing cycles

💬 I want to hear from you:
→ Do you think AI companies are getting more transparent or less?
→ Where do you personally draw the line between hype and reality?
→ Are we improving intelligence — or just scaling better autocomplete?

Drop your take in the comments — I read them.

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for deep, no-hype breakdowns of every major AI release — separating real progress from marketing noise.

videos.title: Can I Break the Record at a Public Golf Course? (One Chance)
videos.summary_source_text:
Can I Break the Record at a Public Golf Course? (One Chance) Sometimes with public courses, you never know exactly what you’re going to get. A lot of people give them a bad rap, but today, we’re playing one of the special ones. I’m at the historic Tenison Park Golf Course in Dallas, Texas, where golf legend Lee Trevino spent years hustling and perfecting his game. The course is in great condition and today I’m attempting to break the course record in only one try. This is going to be a solid test of golf, and hopefully it gets me one step closer to my goal of breaking three course records by the end of the year...

Your trail arm plays a much bigger role in your golf swing than most golfers realise — and if it’s not working correctly, it can lead to weak shots, poor contact, and inconsistency.

In this video, I break down exactly how the trail arm should be moving in the golf swing and why so many golfers get it wrong without even knowing it. Once you understand this movement, it becomes much easier to create better structure, more control, and stronger ball striking.

This is one of the most important but misunderstood parts of the swing, and small changes here can have a huge impact on your overall performance.

If you’ve been struggling with inconsistent shots, this is a simple place to start.

videos.title: Z-Wave Explained: Is It Still Worth Using?
videos.summary_source_text:
Z-Wave Explained: Is It Still Worth Using? Homey supports Z-Wave. Here’s how it works, where it still makes sense, and what to watch for.

Z-Wave is a low-power smart home protocol that runs on sub-GHz frequencies, communicates locally, and is built around certified interoperability. That gives it real strengths throughout the home, especially for battery-powered sensors and locks that need to last for years.

It also has trade-offs: lower data speeds, regional frequency differences, higher device costs, and devices that can only belong to one controller at a time.

This video covers Z-Wave’s history, mesh networking, Z-Wave Long Range, S2 security, device types, direct associations, and how Z-Wave compares with protocols like Zigbee and Wi-Fi.

More about Z-Wave
  ↳ https://homey.app/en-us/wiki/what-is-z-wave/

Discover Homey
  ↳ https://homey.app/

Homey news
  ↳ https://homey.app/news/
