videos.summary_source_text:
Längs Sargen EP20: 20 år senare – Hurricanes tillbaka på tronen Carolina Hurricanes är Stanley Cup-mästare igen. Det tog 20 år för klubben att gå hela vägen sedan sin senaste titel – men nu är laget på den absoluta toppen. Det blev 4-2 i matcher i finalserien mot Vegas Golden Knights och det avhandlar vi naturligtvis i det här avsnittet av Längs Sargen. Ekholm/Duvefelt går igenom Golden Knights slutspel och blickar även framåt för klubben. Avsnittet avslutas med en blick mot NHL-draften som hålls i Buffalo den 26-27 juni.

videos.title: Padraig Harrington: Winning Majors, Playing with Tiger & Unforgettable Celebrations
videos.summary_source_text:
Padraig Harrington: Winning Majors, Playing with Tiger & Unforgettable Celebrations Pádraig Harrington joins George Harper Jr. at The K Club in Ireland for this episode of the Life on Tour podcast, presented by Buffalo Trace, for an insightful and entertaining conversation with one of the most accomplished players in DP World Tour history. With 15 DP World Tour victories and more than 500 tournaments under his belt, Pádraig reflects on a career spent competing at the very highest level and takes listeners inside his remarkable run of three Major Championship victories in just 13 months. He reveals the preparation system, mindset and practice routine that helped him reach the pinnacle of the game.

Pádraig also shares how he celebrated his Open Championship victories, what it was really like going head-to-head with Tiger Woods during golf’s most dominant era, and the lessons he learned from performing under the greatest pressure.

videos.summary_source_text:
Bryson DeChambeau spotted using a new TaylorMade driver 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: The Path to Iron Compression: Simple Drills For Instant Results
videos.summary_source_text:
The Path to Iron Compression: Simple Drills For Instant Results Stop trying to scoop your golf ball up into the air! If you want elite-level low point control and that pure iron compression that better players talk about, you don't need a complicated golf swing. You need 5 minutes a day to fix your impact position.

In this video, we build a step-by-step roadmap to transform your iron play using simple golf drills you can do at home, in the garden, or on the driving range.

What you will learn in this golf lesson:

The Two-Tee Low Point Control Drill: How to stop hitting behind the ball and shift your low point forward for crisp, pure strikes.
The Closed Face Control Drill: A unique practical drill to fix your clubface orientation, improve your wrist angles, and create effortless shaft lean without overthinking your swing positions.
The "Turning the Corner" Secret: Why trying too hard to shift your hips forward actually causes a "flicky," scoopy impact—and the simple one-foot drill to fix it.

Grab an 8-iron and two golf tees, and let's fix your golf swing mechanics so you can start compressing your irons today!

FREE Golf Swing 101 Class here: https://www.markcrossfieldgolf.com/how-to-play-golf-101

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4xswdnF

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

To target cellulite from both angles:
• High-intensity interval training (HIIT)
• Low-carb diet

Just 20 minutes of sprints or cycling, three times per week, combined with lowering insulin through diet, can be more effective than hours of cardio.

videos.title: 469. Pengar, ansvar och RikaTillsammans bakom kulisserna | Del 2 av 2
videos.summary_source_text:
469. Pengar, ansvar och RikaTillsammans bakom kulisserna | Del 2 av 2 Varför väljer jag index trots att jag kan aktier? Varför har vi aldrig velat förvalta andras pengar? Och vad händer när ett hobbyprojekt växer till något som vissa månader når sju procent av Sveriges befolkning?

I den här personliga uppföljningen till avsnittet om pengar, rädslor och bristtänk pratar jag, Caroline och vår kollega Oliver om livet bakom RikaTillsammans. Om identitet, ansvar, status, relationer och de lärdomar som följt med när ett sidoprojekt blivit en stor del av livet.

Vi pratar om varför jag en gång byggde min identitet kring att slå marknaden, varför jag i dag föredrar indexfonder, varför vi valt bort både rådgivning och kapitalförvaltning samt hur vi tänker kring pengar, konsumtion och ett rikt liv.

Det här är ett av våra mest personliga samtal hittills. Hoppas du gillar det. 

⏱️ Kapitel:
00:00:00 – Introduktion till avsnittet
00:02:23 – Vad vi faktiskt spenderar pengar på: mat, resor och städhjälp
00:05:25 – Jan lägger för mycket på Apple-prylar och proteinpuddingar
00:06:47 – Caroline om krämer, kläder och smålögner om priser
00:08:16 – Att lägga för lite pengar på sig själv
00:12:14 – Svårast att göra avkall på: teknikprylar eller skönhetsprodukter
00:15:11 – Vad Jan och Caroline förändrat hos varandra ekonomiskt
00:18:37 – Känsla före logik: Tesla-köpet som statusbeslut och rationalisering i efterhand
00:22:50 – Välgörenhet: fadderbarn, SOS Barnbyar och att ge anonymt
00:25:13 – Carolines stockpicking-träff och varför enskilda aktier är svårt
00:28:30 – Fattigveckan: stoicismens övning i att vänja sig vid obehag
00:31:52 – Hur RikaTillsammans startade: bloggen som egentligen var ett rop på hjälp
00:35:31 – Manlig identitet, aktier och egot i att slå marknaden
00:38:13 – Att jobba ihop som par: olikheter som styrka och källa till konflikt
00:39:36 – Hur stort RikaTillsammans blivit: 35 000 i communityn och hundratusentals nådda varje månad
00:41:37 – Att bli igenkänd, ansvar och möten med följare
00:46:48 – Jurister, investeringsrådgivning och ansvaret i att påverka andra
00:52:01 – Hur RikaTillsammans finansieras: Patreon, reklam, event och det vi valt bort
00:55:19 – Privat och offentlig: varför vi aldrig byggt en fasad
00:58:08 – Communityn: samma rädslor oavsett ekonomi
01:01:02 – Om fem år: sjukvård, hemvärn och framtiden för RikaTillsammans
01:08:06 – Sämsta rådet inom finans och boktips

🔗 Länkar från avsnittet:

• Del 1 – Pengar, rädslor och bristtänk:
https://rikatillsammans.se/avsnitt/pengar-radslor-och-bristtank-en-stor-del-av-var-resa/

• Om oss och historien bakom RikaTillsammans:

I den här personliga uppföljningen till avsnittet om pengar, rädslor och bristtänk pratar jag, Caroline och vår kollega Oliver om livet bakom RikaTillsammans. Om identitet, ansvar, status, relationer och de lärdomar som följt med när ett sidoprojekt blivit en stor del av livet.

Vi pratar om varför jag en gång byggde min identitet kring att slå marknaden, varför jag i dag föredrar indexfonder, varför vi valt bort både rådgivning och kapitalförvaltning samt hur vi tänker kring pengar, konsumtion och ett rikt liv.

Det här är ett av våra mest personliga samtal hittills. Hoppas du gillar det.

If you've been trying to gain driver distance by rotating harder and spinning your hips faster — this video will change how you think about the golf swing. Eric Cogorno and JT Thomas break down why arm and hand speed is the highest return on investment for golfers who want more distance with less effort. The whoosh drill and impact bag drill are practical golf drills any golfer can use to feel what real club head speed is supposed to feel like. If you leave this video without trying the whoosh drill, you're leaving distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why moving the body and club at the same rate destroys driver distance
• The "all gas no brakes" mistake most golfers make and how to fix it
• How to generate speed from your arms and hands for more effortless power
• The whoosh drill and how to use it to train real club head speed
• How the impact bag drill teaches you to swing your arms faster through the hitting zone
• Why slowing the lead side down actually makes the club go faster
• How wrist motion — down, forward, and away from the body — generates speed
• Why senior golfers get the biggest distance gains from arm and hand speed
• Golf tips any golfer can use to learn how to hit driver farther and play better golf

videos.title: Från pilot till affärsvärde – så lyckas ledande bolag med AI
videos.summary_source_text:
Från pilot till affärsvärde – så lyckas ledande bolag med AI AI används brett i dag, men bara 20 % av företagen skapar majoriteten av affärsvärdet. Varför fastnar så många i pilotstadiet – och vad krävs för att lyckas fullt ut?

Lyssna in till denna LinkedIn Live där PwC:s Måns Liljenlov och Andreas Håkansson, AI Lead, delar insikter från AI Performance Study och ger konkreta perspektiv på hur företag kan gå från initiativ till verkligt affärsvärde.

Ta del av undersökningen här: https://www.pwc.se/sv/ai/ai-performance-study-2026.pdf AI används brett i dag, men bara 20 % av företagen skapar majoriteten av affärsvärdet. Varför fastnar så många i pilotstadiet – och vad krävs för att lyckas fullt ut?

videos.title: My golf club store room is pretty special 😍
videos.summary_source_text:
My golf club store room is pretty special 😍 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better

videos.title: Why is Europe SCARED of CHINESE cars! Chery Tiggo 4 Review
videos.summary_source_text:
Why is Europe SCARED of CHINESE cars! Chery Tiggo 4 Review This is our in-depth review of the all-new Chery TIGGO 4. We’re reviewing the interior design, space and practicality, finding out what it’s like to drive, and reviewing how it performs in a 0-60mph & brake test. 

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Car-Vertical

This is the all-new Chery Tiggo 4! 

Mat’s got his hands on this affordable family car to see if this latest offering from China has enough to sway you away from more established competitors like the Renault Captur and Volkswagen T-Roc. 

So let’s get into it, starting with the design. 

On first glance, it’s easy to see that the Tiggo 4 designers have taken inspiration from several other cars. The front end looks reminiscent of a DS7, the rear and side profile look similar to a T-Roc, and the back end looks like a VW Tiguan! Ultimately though, it still looks smart. The large grille helps it stand out, and around the back there are cool-looking taillights and a full-length light bar. 

So while the outside may seem a bit all over the place, it’s a much more premium experience on the inside. There are soft-touch materials throughout the cabin, there are separate buttons for the climate control, and the infotainment & digital dials screen are clear and easy to use. There’s a whole load of storage throughout, and the front seats are pretty comfortable, even if they are missing lumbar support. 

Under the bonnet you’ll find a 1.5-litre hybrid petrol engine that can deliver an impressive 204hp! It has a top speed of 93mph, and can accelerate to 60mph in 8.9 seconds.

The Chery Tiggo 4 is a seriously affordable car. The entry-level starts at just £19,995, while the range-topper (that we have in this video) costs just £21,995! That seriously undercuts competitors like the Dacia Duster and Renault Captur, so is the Tiggo 4 the smart choice if you’re looking for a new car? Stick with Mat and see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1506

videos.title: Staal ➡️ Andersen: Freddie's emotional playoffs culminate in Cup lift! 🇩🇰
videos.summary_source_text:
Staal ➡️ Andersen: Freddie's emotional playoffs culminate in Cup lift! 🇩🇰 Hard work pays off! After starting every game of the Stanley Cup Playoffs until Game 5 of the Final for Carolina, Conn Smythe winner and captain Jordan Staal opts to give Frederik Andersen the Stanley Cup first. Andersen's emotional journey throughout these playoffs ends with him and teammate Nikolaj Ehlers as the second and third Danes to win the Stanley Cup after Lars Eller in 2018 with the Washington Capitals.

videos.title: MISSION COMPLETED!!! THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE THE 2026 STANLEY CUP CHAMPIONS!!!!
videos.summary_source_text:
MISSION COMPLETED!!! THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE THE 2026 STANLEY CUP CHAMPIONS!!!! THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE THE 2026 STANLEY CUP CHAMPIONS!!! They defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 3-0 in Game 6 to win their second-ever Stanley Cup in franchise history! Move over 2006; you have some company with the 2026 Hurricanes!!! On the Monday Stanley Cup Celebration Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the most complete Hurricanes win in the Stanley Cup Final, defeating the Golden Knights 3-0. Brandon Bussi earns his first playoff shutout, coming in a series-clincher. Taylor Hall and Jackson Blake had huge games to help lead the way. Nikolaj Ehlers with the exclamation point! Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Jordan Staal winning the 2026 Conn Smythe. It makes sense to give it to the Captain after scoring six goals in the first five playoff games.  What does it mean for the captain and the Hurricanes? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts after seeing the Hurricanes win their second Stanley Cup in his life. He saw them do it in person in 2006, and now again 20 years later. What does it mean for the city? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 🎙️ In Danish: Ehlers seals Stanley Cup victory with empty net goal, sets Hurricanes history! 🇩🇰
videos.summary_source_text:
🎙️ In Danish: Ehlers seals Stanley Cup victory with empty net goal, sets Hurricanes history! 🇩🇰 Nikolaj Ehlers does it again! The Danish star seals the Hurricanes' Stanley Cup victory over the Golden Knights when he fires home an empty net goal late in the 3rd period to put Carolina up 3-0. Andrei Svechnikov later hands Ehlers the Stanley Cup for the first time in his career as he enjoys his lap with Lord Stanley. Ehlers and teammate Frederik Andersen become just the 2nd and 3rd Danes to win the Stanley Cup, following Lars Eller in 2018 with the Washington Capitals. Ehlers also breaks his tie with Eric Staal and sets the new Hurricanes franchise record for points in a single Stanley Cup Final with 9! Listen to the Danish broadcast call Ehlers' crowning moment!

videos.title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
videos.summary_source_text:
The Internet Is No Longer Human The internet just crossed a line most people missed. Bots now make up most web page requests, Google AI is answering questions before users click, and AI agents are starting to browse, shop, and act online for us.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Cloudflare data showing bots now outnumber humans on web pages
SOURCE: https://radar.cloudflare.com/traffic
Pew Research on how Google AI Overviews reduce website clicks
SOURCE: https://www.pewresearch.org/short-reads/2025/07/22/google-users-are-less-likely-to-click-on-links-when-an-ai-summary-appears-in-the-results/
Cloudflare’s Pay Per Crawl plan for charging AI crawlers
SOURCE: https://blog.cloudflare.com/introducing-pay-per-crawl/
Reuters on Penske suing Google over AI Overviews
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/sustainability/boards-policy-regulation/rolling-stone-billboard-owner-penske-sues-google-over-ai-overviews-2025-09-14/
AP on Visa connecting payments to ChatGPT AI agents
SOURCE: https://apnews.com/article/d769dec86344cb4977c98789e8ec492f

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than bots. The web was built around humans visiting pages, reading content, clicking links, and buying things. Now AI is starting to read the web first, answer for it, browse through it, and even spend money inside it. The question is simple: are we still using the internet, or is the internet slowly being handed to machines?

videos.title: What is Visceral Fat Really Does To the Body
videos.summary_source_text:
What is Visceral Fat Really Does To the Body Most people think body fat is all the same, but where fat is stored matters. The fat under the skin is very different from the fat that surrounds the organs, liver, pancreas, and even the heart itself. This visceral fat is closely linked to inflammation and metabolic dysfunction, which is why it's often associated with a higher risk of chronic disease. The real goal isn't simply losing weight, it's getting rid of the fat that was never meant to be there in the first place.

This is a clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast. You can find the conversation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

This SHOCKED me...The Truth about Graphite Shafts For years, I believed graphite shafts were only for slower swing speeds, seniors, or golfers looking for more forgiveness.

Turns out, I was completely wrong.In this video, I put modern graphite shafts to the test and discovered some surprising performance benefits that many golfers are overlooking. From ball speed and dispersion to feel and consistency, the results challenged everything I thought I knew about shaft technology.

If you've always assumed steel shafts are the only option for serious golfers, this video might change your mind too.

In this video you'll learn:

The biggest myths about graphite shafts, How modern graphite technology has evolved, The performance differences between graphite and steel, Which golfers can benefit most from graphite shafts, Whether making the switch could help your game

Let me know in the comments. Have you ever tried graphite shafts, or are you still playing steel?

videos.title: GPT vs Grok: Who's Actually Winning the AGI Race? (Honest Scoreboard)
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT vs Grok: Who's Actually Winning the AGI Race? (Honest Scoreboard) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Every week there's a new headline screaming that some model is "the smartest AI ever" and AGI is two years away. The charts contradict each other, the benchmarks are cherry-picked, and nobody measures the same thing twice.
So I skipped the hype reels and went through the actual technical reports, leaked parameter counts, benchmark numbers, and published roadmaps from OpenAI and xAI. The surprising part: the model winning the benchmark headlines isn't necessarily the one closest to AGI.
This is GPT vs Grok across the three things that actually matter — what's under the hood, what the benchmarks really say, and how close each one genuinely is to general intelligence. No hype, just the numbers we can verify.

Chapters:
00:00 The AI Headline Problem (Intro)
01:28 Model Architectures
03:34 Training Data & Compute
04:50 Benchmarks: GPT
06:08 Benchmarks: Grok
07:16 Key Takeaway on Benchmarks
08:00 AGI Indicators, Part 1: Generalization & Reasoning
09:28 AGI Indicators, Part 2: Tools, Learning & Safety
11:12 Summing Up the Indicators
11:41 Compute & Scaling
13:08 AGI Timeline Projections
14:02 The Probabilistic Forecast


If this breakdown saved you from another week of contradictory headlines, subscribe — skepticism is the whole point of this channel.

Who do you think cracks AGI first: the broad generalist or the brute-force specialist? Make your case in the comments. Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

videos.title: The Main Factor Why Sidney Crosby Has Better Hockey IQ (It's Not What You Think)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Main Factor Why Sidney Crosby Has Better Hockey IQ (It's Not What You Think) Why Sidney Crosby Has Better Hockey IQ (It's Not What You Think)

Something to think about on hockey IQ which is actually one of the most misunderstood things in the sport. Most people think it's about being naturally smart on the ice when yes that is apart of it but it really comes down to mechanics. There are lots of smart hockey players out there, but none with the same IQ as Sidney Crosby. One reason is Crosby can actually use his full mental bandwidth and most players simply can't for a variety of mechanical related reasons.

In this video I break down the kinesiology of why trying harder actually makes you slower, what the "inner spring" is and how the best players in the world combine it with their active muscle contractions to move faster with less effort, and the turbo-boost mechanism inside your spinal cord that frees up your brain to scan the ice, read plays, and stay two steps ahead. Watch the full breakdown to see why mechanics, not IQ, is what lets Crosby play the way he does.

Something to think about on hockey IQ which is actually one of the most misunderstood things in the sport. Most people think it's about being naturally smart on the ice when yes that is apart of it but it really comes down to mechanics. There are lots of smart hockey players out there, but none with the same IQ as Sidney Crosby. One reason is Crosby can actually use his full mental bandwidth and most players simply can't for a variety of mechanical related reasons.

In this video I break down the kinesiology of why trying harder actually makes you slower, what the "inner spring" is and how the best players in the world combine it with their active muscle contractions to move faster with less effort, and the turbo-boost mechanism inside your spinal cord that frees up your brain to scan the ice, read plays, and stay two steps ahead. Watch the full breakdown to see why mechanics, not IQ, is what lets Crosby play the way he does.

Why Fasting May Be the Answer to Getting Rid of Stubborn Visceral Fat | @ThePrimal.Podcast Clip In this clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast, I explain why visceral fat is one of the most dangerous types of fat for heart health. I’ll break down what actually causes visceral fat to build up, how it connects to inflammation and metabolic disease, and why fasting can be such a powerful tool for helping the body get rid of it.

Watch the full conversation here https://youtu.be/y5WeiL_fsMQ

@pradipjamnadasmd and @thegalenfoundation

I Trained My Golf Swing Speed For 30 Days... Here's What Happened Can speed training really add serious distance to your golf game? Ben puts the Speed Toad to the test for 30 days, following a dedicated speed training plan to see just how much clubhead speed, ball speed and distance he can gain. With one goal in mind – beating Rick Shiels off the tee – this challenge tracks the highs, lows and surprising results of a month spent chasing more speed. Did it work, or is speed training just another golf gimmick? Watch to find out.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

buying your first proper set,

videos.title: The Real Reason Your Eyesight Keeps Getting Worse (& How to Relieve It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Real Reason Your Eyesight Keeps Getting Worse (& How to Relieve It) Digital eye strain can affect far more than just your eyes. Discover what happens to your eyes and brain after 8 hours of screen time, how screen use can contribute to myopia, and the best strategies for eye strain relief.

0:00 Digital eye strain
0:25 Myopia in children
1:18 Computer eye strain hour by hour 
3:25 Sunlight and your eyes
6:15 Peripheral vision and digital eye strain 
6:43 Nearsightedness after 8 hours of screen time
7:11 How to reduce eye strain
8:38 Daily sun for eye strain relief 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/49YfcYr

Explore more ways to reduce digital eye strain and support healthy vision naturally:
▶️ https://youtu.be/nCnZX8zs4LI
▶️ https://youtu.be/CozZ1Rcm55E
▶️ https://youtu.be/oXhOK2880i8

Check out this article to learn about the most important nutrients for the eyes: https://drbrg.co/4xiUIDA

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Digital eye strain is becoming increasingly common as screen time continues to rise. Because the retina is actually brain tissue, prolonged screen use can affect both eye health and brain function.

The ciliary muscle controls the lens of the eye, allowing you to focus on objects that are near or far away. Extended screen time keeps this muscle contracted for hours at a time, making it difficult for the eyes to relax.

During the first few hours of screen use, you may not notice any symptoms. As screen time continues, your blink rate can drop significantly, reducing the lubrication of the eyes and contributing to digital eye strain.

After several hours of continuous screen use, the ciliary muscle can lose its ability to fully relax, similar to a muscle cramp. This may contribute to eye fatigue, difficulty focusing, dizziness, disorientation, reduced peripheral vision, and other symptoms associated with prolonged screen exposure.

One of the best ways to reduce eye strain and support eye health is to regularly look into the distance and spend time outdoors. Try leaving the house without your phone for 20 minutes and allow your gaze to naturally drift. Taking frequent breaks outside can help relax the eyes, support healthy vision, and may help reduce the risk of myopia.

The US government stepped in, access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 was shut down, and now the AI world is facing a huge question: what happens when frontier AI becomes too powerful for public access?

videos.title: Is Gemini 4 AGI? What Google Has Really Shipped
videos.summary_source_text:
Is Gemini 4 AGI? What Google Has Really Shipped Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's selling you a "Gemini 4 LEAKED" thumbnail. The problem? As of right now, Gemini 4 doesn't exist in a single official Google channel — no blog post, no API entry, no dated release note. In this video we skip the recycled rumors and go straight to the source: Google's developer docs, the I/O 2026 keynote, and the actual API catalog. Then we line up the Gemini line against the rivals it'll have to beat, and answer the question behind every clickbait title — is this thing AGI?

By the end you'll be able to spot a fake Gemini 4 leak in two seconds flat.

We cover what Google has actually shipped (the Gemini 3.5 series), the release cadence everyone's reading the tea leaves on, the credible signals (including Demis Hassabis on the record), where Gemini sits against OpenAI and Anthropic on context and modality, what a real Gemini 4 would change for research, products, and enterprise — and a clear-eyed look at the AGI question and the risks that ride along with every capability jump.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 — The hype problem (and what's really there)
1:09 — The Official Word: what Google has shipped
3:10 — Rumors & Expectations: the informed bets
5:11 — How It Stacks Up Against the Competition
6:52 — What a Real Gemini 4 Would Actually Change
8:34 — Is Gemini 4 AGI?
9:57 — The Risks Nobody Should Skip
11:09 — The Bottom Line

🔎 What did you already see floating around as a "Gemini 4 release date"? Drop it in the comments — let's see how many of these so-called leaks contradict each other.

👍 If you're sick of the hype cycle, a like helps the channel reach more people who want the no-hype version.
🔔 Subscribe — the second Google posts the real model card and benchmarks, I'm covering it here first.

videos.title: What Are We Really Eating?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Are We Really Eating? For thousands of years, food came directly from nature. A plant came from the ground, fruit came from a tree, and meat came from a single animal. Today, many food products are created by combining ingredients from countless different sources into something entirely new. The more food becomes a product instead of a food, the more important it becomes to ask what we are really eating.

This is a clip from my video "How to Make Dinner the Feast Your Body is Craving"

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. videos.title: Claude Fable 5 Is Getting Roasted — Here's Why
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 Is Getting Roasted — Here's Why Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

You're paying for an AI assistant every month — but is it the RIGHT one for your work? In 2026, "Best AI" isn't a simple answer anymore, so here's the most honest, hype-free breakdown of Anthropic's brand-new Claude Fable 5.


In this video we cover: Anthropic's official launch story — the 1-million-token context window, $10/$50 pricing, and the introduction of the new Mythos class. Real developer reactions — from Simon Willison to hands-on coding benchmarks (80.3% on SWE-Bench Pro, beating both Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5). 


The controversy that dominated headlines — a mandatory 30-day data retention policy, even for enterprise customers who previously had zero-retention agreements. And the biggest twist: a Wired report exposing Anthropic's quiet plan to "silently degrade" outputs for competing AI builders — and the public reversal that followed within just 48 hours.


We break down the difference between Fable 5 and Mythos 5, how the safety classifiers actually work, the false positives developers are running into, and whether the price hike is justified or not.


⏱️ CHAPTERS

00:02:01 Feature / Guardrail Details
00:03:08 Community Reactions — Positive
00:04:14 Community Reactions — Trade-Offs and Concerns
00:05:34 Company Response and Iteration
00:06:51 Counterpoints And Competitors
00:07:54 Implications For Devs, Startups, And Users


No hype. Just evidence, benchmarks, and community feedback — so you can decide for yourself if this launch is a game-changer or just clever marketing.

📩 Join our newsletter for deeper analysis: https://bitbiased.ai/

📌 Comment below: are you trying Fable 5, or is the data retention a dealbreaker for you?

If you're a high handicap golfer struggling with thin iron shots, no divot, and no compression — this is your problem too. In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno shows exactly why the fix isn't at impact. It starts with the takeaway. Billy's club was getting too far low and inside due to a lack of vertical wrist hinge. Eric walks through the exact golf drills used to fix Billy's golf swing, improve his swing plane, and get him compressing the golf ball. These are practical golf tips any high handicap golfer can apply to start hitting better iron shots and learn how to play golf at a higher level.

What You'll Learn:
• Why a lack of vertical wrist hinge causes an under-plane takeaway and poor iron contact
• How to use the Swing Coach App to identify golf swing problems in real time
• How to increase wrist hinge progressively during the backswing for better compression
• The butt-of-club and shaft-parallel checkpoint for correct early hinge
• The thud the mat drill for consistent ground interaction and divots
• How the 3:00 and 2:00 station golf drill keeps the club on plane through the takeaway and downswing
• Why high handicap golfers who are too far inside must exaggerate to find neutral swing plane
• How handle position at setup pre-sets swing plane and wrist hinge
• How to compress the golf ball and stop hitting thin iron shots for good

videos.title: The New Driver Technique Making Senior Golfers Hit Longer
videos.summary_source_text:
The New Driver Technique Making Senior Golfers Hit Longer Most senior golfers think they’re losing distance because of age…but what if the real reason is how they’re starting the driver swing?

In this golf lesson, Danny Maude shares a simple driver setup and swing feel that can help senior golfers make a longer backswing, turn more freely, hit up on driver and create more distance without forcing the golf swing.

After spending three days with world-class coach Andy Plummer, Danny learned a simple idea called the “wrench drill”. It helps you use your lead side as a pivot point so you can turn more easily, swing the club on a better arc, and release the club with more speed and control.

If you struggle to hit driver straight, lose distance off the tee, slice your driver, or feel like your backswing has become shorter with age, this could be a game changer.

In this video, you’ll learn:

▪️Why senior golfers lose driver distance
▪️Why it’s not always about age or flexibility
▪️How to start your driver swing from a better driver setup
▪️The simple “wrench drill” to help you turn more easily
▪️How to create a longer backswing without strain
▪️Why this setup can help you hit up on driver golf swing
▪️How to reduce a slice by improving your golf swing arc
▪️How to release your arms for more speed and control
▪️Why lunging with the body can kill power and accuracy

videos.title: The Most Dangerous Walk You'll Ever Take (& Why It's Worth It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Dangerous Walk You'll Ever Take (& Why It's Worth It) Most people overlook this simple walking exercise that supports ankle strength, hamstring flexibility, and helps improve balance naturally. Discover the profound benefits of reverse walking for brain health, knee pain relief, mobility, and more. It can even promote brain rewiring!

0:00 Introduction: Walking for brain health
0:59 Natural movement/walking on flat surfaces 
3:00 Walking backwards 
3:14 Backward walking benefits
3:52 Walking backwards uphill
4:57 How to prevent injury while reverse walking

The Backward Hill Protocol: https://drbrg.co/4xCZ1Ki

10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4vFlip4

Keep watching for more powerful ways to improve movement and support longevity:
https://youtu.be/zs1a8tFsvdc
https://youtu.be/JQo_edypQOE
https://youtu.be/HXt5kTTTrho

Read more on natural ways to reduce pain and inflammation here: https://drbrg.co/4uOlNwG

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Walking on flat surfaces does not mimic natural movement. Natural movement involves uneven terrain, inclines, rocks, and other unpredictable surfaces that challenge the body and brain.

The cerebellum, which controls balance, contains nearly half of the brain's neurons. When movement becomes repetitive and automatic, the brain doesn’t have to work as hard. Novel movement and changing pressure patterns can help stimulate the brain in new ways.

Reverse walking shifts pressure away from the knees and forces the hamstrings and glutes to become more active.

Some of the benefits of reverse walking include:
• Reduced knee pressure
• Improved hamstring flexibility
• Better balance and coordination
• Cognitive function improvement

Once you’re comfortable with reverse walking, try walking backwards uphill. Reverse walking uphill is one of the best glute activation exercises and can also help improve ankle strength and coordination.

videos.title: Vill du Lyckas med Revben som faller av benet och är supermöra? Spara då detta recept!
videos.summary_source_text:
Vill du Lyckas med Revben som faller av benet och är supermöra? Spara då detta recept! Vill du Lyckas med Revben som faller av benet och är supermöra? Spara då detta recept! 
Asiatiska Revben av Pappa Poon

Recept:
1st Revben

Marinad:
2dl hoisin
3st vitlöksklyftor, rivna
1tsk MSG
1tsk five spice
3/4 dl ljus sirap
1tsk salt

Topping:
2 msk Furikake eller sesamfrön
salladslök

Gör så här:
Blanda marinaden. Dra bort hinnan som sitter mot benen, i visa fall är den redan bortdragen.
lägg ut två lager aliminiumfolie, lägg ribsen på och häll eller pensla på 2/3 av marinaden, täck båda sidor.
förslut ribsen och ställ i ugenen på 160°c i ca 2h. Ta ut vik upp foliet och pensla på mer av såsen. Grilla i ugenen på 220°c i ca 5-10min. ta ut och låt vila! Njut! Vill du Lyckas med Revben som faller av benet och är supermöra? Spara då detta recept!

videos.title: This putter has a HOCKEY stick grip 🏒🤯
videos.summary_source_text:
This putter has a HOCKEY stick grip 🏒🤯 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Lambo Temerario v Ferrari SF90: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Lambo Temerario v Ferrari SF90: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing the all-new Lamborghini Temerario against the Ferrari SF90 in a drag race over the quarter-mile and half-mile. 

Explore new and used cars with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1306

It’s the one you’ve all been waiting for - Lamborghini Temerario vs Ferrari SF90! 

The Temerario has already left the Revuelto and 296 GTB in its wake, so what chance does the SF90 have?! It’s time to take a closer look…

The Lamborghini Temerario rolls up with a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and three electric motors. These combine to produce 920hp and 730Nm. It weighs in at 1,790kg, and it costs around £260,000.

Then we come to the Ferrari. It also has a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and three electric motors, but in this instance it produces 1000hp and 800Nm! Power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed dual-clutch, and it tips the scales at 1,770kg. It’s from the class above the Temerario, so it’s no surprise it costs more - coming in at £550,000!

So how will this one play out? The Ferrari has more power, but it’s six years older than the Temerario! There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to everyone who helped us set up this race: 
- Lambo Temerario: https://www.instagram.com/affluent_time
- Lambo Temerario: https://www.instagram.com/joseph_sewell_
- Ferrari SF90: @MarkMcCann64
